confidence_rationale: Clear instructional video with professional production, educational overlays, and systematic teaching progression. Not a performance to be scored.
technique_summary: Comprehensive instructional video covering fundamental laparoscopic skills including instrument identification, proper grip techniques, triangulation principles, and spatial awareness concepts.

demonstrated_techniques: proper ergonomic grip on laparoscopic instruments
fenestrated traumatic grasping forceps identification and use
bilateral hand coordination for laparoscopic manipulation
triangulation principle for optimal instrument positioning
elevation angle concepts for spatial awareness
common_errors_addressed: improper instrument grip leading to fatigue
inadequate spatial awareness in laparoscopic environment
